segment-text: George Miller & Augusta Gore
My name is Alithea. My story is true. You're more likely to believe me, however, if I tell it as a fairy tale.
A common PASSENGER JET advances into frame - close above us, its nose, belly and wings overwhelm.
So...Once upon a time, when humans hurtled across the sky on metal wings...
As we creep along the aisle, an oceanographic documentary screens on the in-flight entertainment.
...When they wore webbed feet and walked on the bottom of the sea...
Further along, a passenger - wearing earbuds - is scrolling through a playlist on his
When they held, in their hands, glass tiles that could coax love songs from the air... We settle on ALITHEA BINNIE.
...There was a woman, adequately happy and alone.
She has the concave posture of a constant reader.
...Alone, by choice.
A book is reflected in the lenses of her glasses. Her EYES dart briskly, utterly focused...
...Happy, because she was independent living off the exercise of her scholarly mind.
She is reading with startling rapidity, running her thumb down the margins of each page for little more than a second before flicking to the next. Her leg jiggling all the
Her business was Story. She was a narratologist, who sought to find the truths common to all the stories of humankind.
Oblivious to the GLANCES of the PASSENGERS around her, she finishes the book. There are two more waiting to be read.
To this end, once or twice a year, she ventured to strange lands - to China, the South Seas and the timeless cities of the Levant...
EXT Through the clouds, the MINARETS OF ISTANBUL glisten below. The aircraft's UNDERCARRIAGE opens.
...Where her kind gathered to tell stories about stories.
INT The WHEELS approach the TARMAC and... SLAM! CUT TO the WOBBLY, SQUEALING WHEEL of a BAGGAGE CART. ALITHEA BINNIE pushes it, making her way through the crowd at...
EXT ISTANBUL AIRPORT

A HEAVY HAND brushes hers aside, rudely grabbing the handle of the cart. She looks up to see an UNSETTLING MAN, small and bald in a voluminous sheepskin jacket. He FORCES HER CART in an unwanted direction. UNSETTLING MAN This way.
Excuse me. UNSETTLING MAN This way, lady.
She tries to steer it back.
What are you doing? Can you let go please.
He looks AT HER DIRECTLY with pale, cold eyes!
(insistent) The mysteries of Istanbul.
For a moment, his skin seems to be VAPOROUS and a few FLECKS of FINE ASH float around him. Then...
(off screen) ALITHEA! ALITHEA!!

She and the Unsettling Man look across the crowd to... The IMPOSING FIGURE of Professor GUNHAN RIFAT (40's, exuberant) making his way towards them. When she turns back, THE MAN has SLUNK into the CROWD... OTHER WORLDLY, he shimmers - like A MIRAGE. Then, HE IS GONE.
Welcome. Welcome, at last.
My dear friend.
Gunhan!
GUNHAN embraces her generously. As she is introduced to the GREETING PARTY, ALITHEA REMAINS DISTRACTED while listening to the small-talk... ... 'This is Amina'
... 'from the British Council'

The DRIVER steps forward to take the baggage, but... Alithea Binnie INSISTS on pushing her own cart towards the carpark. INT LATER. TRAVELLING IN THE CAR... ALITHEA watches the street life of Istanbul from the front seat, but she is preoccupied...
That fellow at the airport, manhandling my luggage. Did you see him?
What fellow?
He scuttled off when you arrived. Small. Sheepskin Jacket. Pink Collar.
The OTHERS shake their heads.
Interesting.
He was hot to touch. Musky.
(casually) Perhaps he was a Djinn? An illegal taxi driver, more likely. Wearing too much cologne. They are enjoying themselves.
ALITHEA continues her line of inquiry.
So, Professor, you're saying you believe in Djinn?
I believe there are those who need to believe in them.
Including me?
...Djinn, ghosts. Aliens. Whatever helps.
Everyone chuckles, except... ALITHEA, who remains UNSETTLED. A bird's-eye view of...
EXT THE GRAND PERA PALAS HOTEL
Distinctly Belle Epoque. A Bell Boy and the GREETING PARTY guide ALITHEA to her room... ...'The hotel has arranged a lovely surprise for you'.
INT THE DOOR TO ROOM 333 IS OPENED
It's the Agatha Christie Room. In this room she wrote 'Murder on the Orient Express'. ALITHEA is ushered in... It is charmingly appointed and lined with books.
INT A PORTER...

Lifts her suitcases onto the rack. The bag tags are ripped off. ALITHEA latches the door shut. CLACK! Finally, a moment of solitude and reflection...to let go of the strange presence that unsettled her at the airport.
INT THE CHAPEL OF HAGIA IRENE, TOPKAPI PALACE
This is where the symposium is being held. It is packed with Narratologists from all over the globe. They LAUGH in response to Professor GUNHAN's joviality, as he continues with his address...
So...how would you explain the power of a thunderstorm, if you don't have the means to measure and model meteorological data?
ALITHEA is seated on a swivel chair, on one side of the stage. On the other side, GUNHAN is controlling the PowerPoint.
How can you explain the seasons Autumn through Winter to Spring and Summer...
GUNHAN clicks the remote. On one of the large screens behind him, we see an ANIMATION of the EARTH'S PATH around the SUN - its light favouring one hemisphere over the other.
...if you don't know that the earth orbits the sun while tilted on an axis?
The CONSEQUENCES of this are seen in IMAGES of the seasons.

Everything was mystery. The Seasons. Tsunamis. Microbial disease. What else could we do, but resort to stories? (gesturing to Alithea) As Dr Binnie has encouraged us to understand, stories were once the only way to make our bewildering existence coherent.
That's exactly right.
ALITHEA turns to address the AUDIENCE...
We gave name to the unknown forces behind all wonders and catastrophe by telling each other...
As she speaks, the CAMERA GLIDES across the back of her head...from one side to the other...and we reveal... A PALE PRESENCE on the BALCONY above the crowd.
By telling each other stories... Does anyone else notice the eerie, elongated FIGURE?
She closes her eyes. When she opens them... It is GONE.
It's on the OTHER SIDE of the auditorium. SITTING several rows back in the CROWD. We hold ALITHEA'S face while, in the background, GUNHAN continues...
Let me show you.
With this, he clicks the screen... The PLANETARY ANIMATION is replaced by GODDESSES of the SEASONS and HARVEST...
We told tales of specific, powerful, relatable Gods. Ever-present, in all cultures, in all mythologies. We see the Greek PERSEPHONE, The Norse FREYA and their kind.
From the Greeks, to the Romans, to the Norse and so on.

ALITHEA cannot look away from the PALE PRESENCE. She chances a look at GUNHAN to see if he can see it too. When she looks back... It is sitting in the ROW directly IN FRONT OF HER! Everyone else is looking at the SCREENS, where images of the MANY GODS are arranged into complex FAMILY TREES.
The familiar descendants of Zeus, Poseidon, Athena, Thor, the whole gang find expression even today. The GENEALOGIES of the Greek and Norse Gods EVOLVE into...
The present-day MARVEL and DC SUPERHEROES.
These are their vestiges.
Fascinated by the PALE PRESENCE, ALITHEA speaks as if directly to it.
The question remains - what is their purpose?
Unnoticed by anyone else, the PRESENCE gets slowly to its feet. ALITHEA mirrors its action. Standing. Meeting its gaze.
What do we require of them now?
It's as if she is waiting for an answer. Puzzled by ALITHEA'S odd behaviour, GUNHAN tries to prompt her...
There is Mythos and there is Science...
She remains distracted.
Mythology is what we knew back then. Science is what we know so far. Sooner or later, our creation stories are replaced by the narratives of science. Painstaking science. And all Gods and Monsters
outlive their original purpose and are reduced to metaphor. LOUD UNSETTLING VOICE

ALITHEA looks to the AUDIENCE. No one else - including GUNHAN - seems to have heard it. Yet, out of the MASS of FACES... The PALE PRESENCE RUSHES FORWARD with a SILENT ROAR! Its CAVERNOUS, TOOTHLESS MAW emitting a dark vapour. Squid-inking the SCREEN to... For a long moment, there is no sound. Then, the murmur of the crowd...
(spoken in Turkish, subtitled in English) ...She fainted! ...Why?...

I don't know...She just fell! And - as if emerging from underwater - the voice of Gunhan calling her name. CLOSE on ALITHEA'S FACE from a bizarre angle. Her eyes roll into place and find focus. Now she realises... She is flat on her back on the floor. Nearby, her chair lies fallen. Despite Gunhan's protests, she gets to her feet.
Are you okay?
As he ushers her off stage, she gives a 'thumbs up' - indicating she's okay. The AUDIENCE begins a relieved APPLAUSE. The CLAP-CLAP-CLAP of a WOODEN RATTLE, twirled by a street vendor in...
INT THE AVENUE OUTSIDE TOPKAPI PALACE
Where ALITHEA is walking briskly - as if away from something. GUNHAN hurries to catch up.
Shouldn't you see a doctor?
Why? When I feel so well?
Forgive me, Alithea, are you sure?
Apart from the usual aches and pains, there is nothing untoward. Nothing to make a fuss.
She marches forward.
So what happened back there?
She stops, owing him a proper answer.
Lately, my imagination's been getting the better of me. Ambushing me.
GUNHAN needs more.
I think it's a warning.
About what?
Not to be complacent. To keep on my toes. It manifests, rudely, from time to time. I try not to fight it off. It takes charge for a moment,
then it steps back.
What steps back?
Oh, Gunhan, it's irrational. Pay it no mind.
She strides on. Again, GUNHAN hurries after her - concerned.
You are behaving like a child, you know that?
You know, I am actually a child?
If there is fate, can we escape it? Who can say? But I tell you this...
In the Grand Bazaar of Istanbul there are 62 streets and 4000 shops.
Tracking shots of an endless variety of shop fronts. Each of them overabundant with wares.
And in one of those shops there are three rooms.
In the smallest of those rooms there was a pile of things unsorted, old and new. INT We find our way there.
From the bottom of that pile, I chose a memento.

It is a SMALL GLASS BOTTLE... She holds it in her hand, wipes away the dust. Half of it is a whirl of blue-white stripes and the other half malformed, as if melted. She finds the YOUNG SHOPKEEPER at the counter.
Do you know what this is?

He takes THE BOTTLE from her and tries to improve its appearance. He gives the GLASS STOPPER an experimental twist, but it does not budge. YOUNG SHOPKEEPER I'm not sure. But it could be Cesm-i Bulbul - a 'Nightingale's Eye'. Around 1845, there were these glassmakers in Incirkoy, they were famous for this spiral blue white pattern. GUNHAN steps in.
Please, it's a gift from me. Choose something less forlorn.
And if this is Cesm-i Bulbul, is there a way of authenticating it?
The Young Shopkeeper holds the bottle up to the light.
They say - if it's genuine - sometimes you can see
specks of blood from the lungs of the glassblowers. He hands it back to Alithea.
But this is more likely a recent imitation. GUNHAN is offering more expensive gifts.
It's been damaged by fire. Pick something else.
No, thank you, Gunhan. I like it. Whatever it is, I'm sure it has an interesting story.
She places it on the counter for the Young Shopkeeper to wrap. The bird's-eye view of...
INT THE GRAND PERA PALAS HOTEL TIME LAPSE from pre-dawn to early morning. INT IN HER BATHROOM
ALITHEA'S GLASSES sit - fogged - on the vanity. She picks them up, loops the lanyard over her head, swathes her wet hair in a towel and pootles into the...
INT BEDROOM
Where she answers the phone.
Hello. Good morning. (confirming her order) ...Yes...Runny please...yes but no crusts. No. Just one. Thank you.
As she speaks, ALITHEA gazes at the small PACKAGE containing the CESM-I BULBUL BOTTLE. She picks it up and unwraps it, as she heads back into the...
INT BATHROOM

She sets the tissue paper aside and runs THE BOTTLE under the tap. She rubs away at the grimy surface, revealing more of its cobalt blue and white pattern. With her thumbs and fingers, she massages the clay-encrusted stopper. But it won't come loose. Now she goes at it with her ELECTRIC TOOTHBRUSH. The VIBRATIONS intensify and...from within... FFOOOOSSHHK! THE CESM-I BULBUL LEAPS FROM HER HAND like a frog. The stopper falls, tinkling but unbroken into the basin. THEN...from its mouth... A thermal blast which ignites the tissue paper in which it was wrapped. This is followed by a WISP...an EMANATION...a prodigious FLOW from the BOTTLE. It billows CRIMSON, BLUE, GREY and BLACK as it surges into the BEDROOM. ALITHEA is taken aback. Her glasses fall off her face and hang from the lanyard around her neck. The bathroom is cast in shadow as an ENORMOUS FOOT (out of focus) blocks the doorway! She is puzzled. Apprehensive. Trying to process what's before her... FIVE GREAT TOES, a throbbing vein inside an ANKLE of EBONY SHEENED SKIN. Unstable, vaporous. After a moment, she steps forward and reaches out to touch the FOOT. But it SWELLS and RETRACTS, with a sucking sound, into the bedroom, from where is heard a THRUMMING MURMUR. Deep. Musical. An incantation of gratitude, or expletive, perhaps. ALITHEA follows the foot into... INT THE BEDROOM... Where she sees the rest of THE DJINN. A hulking, inevitable presence. BLUE-BLACK, like a moonlit night.
I'm going to close my eyes and count to three. After which, I would be grateful if you were gone.
She closes her EYES.
One...Two...Three. When she opens them...
She is clearly unsatisfied. So, she closes them again. Willing him away...
Four. Five. Six...Seven Eight Nine Ten!

When her EYES OPEN once more... HE IS STILL THERE. SILHOUETTED and OUT OF FOCUS, his DARK FIGURE is CRAMMED into the room, curled around himself like a snake. His huge head and shoulders pushing against the ceiling. ALITHEA puts on her glasses to examine the SKIN OF HIS BACK. Polychromatic. Like satin. She cannot see his face. He is TURNED AWAY from her - murmuring in an unknown language (this is Djinnbish)
I don't suppose you speak English? No response.
Deutsch? Espanol? Ellenika?
THE DJINN turns one of his long, elegantly shaped ears to listen.
(Spoken in Ancient Greek, subtitled in English) You speak the Greek of Homer?
His voice does not conform to the expected acoustics of the room. It is, at once, a whisper and a bellow. What else can ALITHEA do, but respond?
(in Ancient Greek) I took some classes at university. THE DJINN's form seems to be fluctuating - coming more into proportion.
(Parts of him are covered in finely woven pearlescent scales melded with intricate birdof-paradise feathers.)
Please - do not fear me, nor treat me casually. I am beholden to you for this release. On that account, I must grant you three wishes.
She is SCEPTICAL. Uneasy.
THE DJINN begins to run his hand across the bookshelves - his fingers seem to be drawing scintillations from the books. Is this how he learns?
There are laws which cannot be broken. Three is three, a number of power, thus, you may not wish for endless wishes.
Yes. I'm familiar with the concept. Now he is BRUSHING his hand over the desk. The Bible. The Quran in English.
Glossy magazines. Even Alithea's LAPTOP.
Nor may you wish for eternal life. It is your nature to be mortal. Mine to be immortal.
(in Ancient Greek) Naturally.
Nor can I absolve sin or end all suffering. I am only a Djinn.
(in Ancient Greek) That's reasonable.
(in Ancient Greek) These are the limits.

At this point, he places a FINGER on top of the TV... causing it to SWITCH ON. It's as if THE DJINN is absorbing its content. A MAN is giving a PRESENTATION - in English - on an adventurous technological advance. The Man is ALBERT EINSTEIN.
(in Ancient Greek) What is this small human?
(in Ancient Greek) He is a... Wizard. Guiding us through time. Einstein.
(in Ancient Greek) 'Einstein.' Are you a witch who has him in a box?
(in Ancient Greek) No. It is science. (English) 'Television.'
He echoes her.
'Television.'
(in Ancient Greek) Waves of light and sound... 'transmitters.' THE DJINN 'Transmitters.'
(in Ancient Greek) I'm not sure how it works. I am a literary scholar. We don't know much. THE DJINN (in English) I am a Djinn of modest power, but I begin to understand these 'transmissions'.
Oh. You have learnt to speak my language.
This English is straightforward. It's rules quickly learn I find.

Now, he prods the image on the TV screen. There is a sound. High-pitched. Its volume increasing... A GRID of PIXELS emerges in the form of a TINY ALBERT EINSTEIN. He stands dazed in THE DJINN'S PALM, while the image on the screen is frozen midpresentation.
Would you like this Little Albert for yourself?
No, no. That can't be good for him. Put him back.
I could expand him. We could speak with him.
...how is this possible?
No. Put him back!
TINY ALBERT EINSTEIN stumbles about, his bewilderment intensifying. The high-pitched sound builds to an alarming crescendo...
Is that your wish?
He peers at her from OVER HIS SHOULDER. Revealing one of his LARGE EYES.
No! It's your obligation!

With a gentle puff, THE DJINN blows Einstein's image back into the TV. In that instant, the high-pitched sound stops. ALBERT EINSTEIN recovers and continues his speech. On ALITHEA, as THE DJINN shifts to address her...
So what will you wish for? What is your heart's desire?
Now, let's not get ahead of ourselves...
She TURNS AWAY FROM HIM.
I need to take this slow.
She removes her glasses.
(casually) I have all the time in the world... Tell me about yourself.
(hurriedly) My name is Alithea Binnie. I am in Turkey for a conference and return to my homeland in a day's time.
Also...?
Also, I have a confession to make.
He nods encouragement.
Something I've never told anybody. THE DJINN Excellent!
When I was young, there was a boy. THE DJINN Your first lover!
No... he was not of flesh and blood.
A Djinn?
No. At that time I found myself in a school for girls. Gaggles of girls. I was...well I am a... solitary creature by nature... Now we see...
INT A CROWDED DORMITORY - 1983

Among the students - vigorous in their evening activities - ONE SITS STILL at a desk, HER BACK TO US. She is reading, leg jiggling, as she flicks from one page to the next with startling rapidity. TWELVE-YEAR-OLD ALITHEA.
And this boy, Enzo, he came to me...
She sits on one half of the chair, as if sharing it with an invisible friend.
He came out of an emptiness, a need to imagine...
The image MORPHS briefly into a NOTEBOOK DRAWING of ENZO, SITTING NEXT TO HER.
He told me stories in a language only we two spoke.
The back of YOUNG ALITHEA'S THORAX - her shoulders hunch and her neck muscles strain. She is struggling to breathe. Her face is masked by a nebulizer. INT She is alone in the SCHOOL INFIRMARY...
He would disappear when I had a headache, but was always there when I couldn't move for asthma.
A delicate, almost translucent HAND SETTLES ON HER SHOULDER. Comforting her. As her breathing eases, the hand fades away.
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM...
On ALITHEA...
He was like this Little Albert you would not let me give you? An emanation?
Only the emanation of an absence. I feared he would leave, so I wrote him down. INT WE SEE...
Her youthful hand, WRITING in a SCRAPBOOK thick with pressed flowers, collages of magazine clippings, drawings, notes and letters.
I filled this journal, bulging with facts...
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM...
But, the more realism I tried to insert, the more I began to doubt. The whole thing felt silly. I felt silly.
Of several burning scrapbooks. CINDERED PAPER floating on the air.
After a time, I burnt it all in the school furnace.
Her DRAWING of ENZO'S smiling face - distorted by the intensifying flames.
INT IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
And he disappeared altogether. THE DJINN...
Places a hand on her shoulder.
And yet...I am here.

ALITHEA studies HIS FACE (and, for the first time, so do we)... Completely hairless. Huge eyelids hood lovely dark eyes flecked with malachite. High cheekbones. An imperious hooked nose. A wide simmering mouth sculpted like an Egyptian pharaoh's.
(warily) Contrary to reason...yes.
He takes her by both shoulders and gently wobbles her.
I am here. And we have work to do. THEN...
A polite TAP TAP at the door. This interrupts ALITHEA'S focus. TAP TAP TAP!!
Can you come back later please?
It's Room Service. Dr Binnie, I have your breakfast?
THE DJINN indicates it's okay for her to go. She looks at him, as if to say, 'Are you sure?' He nods.
Just a minute.

ALITHEA puts on her glasses and - as she walks hesitantly to the door - the ambient light lifts. She looks back into the room to see... THE DJINN is gone. We may notice that the soundscape has become more naturalistic The humming of an air conditioner, distant traffic below and an aircraft overhead. She unhitches the latch and OPENS THE DOOR to find the TURKISH WAITER with breakfast.
I'll take it. Thank you.
Please, allow me.
She grabs the tray.
Jolly good, Dr Binnie. I hope you're well rested?
I believe so.
She places the tray on a side table.
What do you plan to do on this fine day?
Visit the sights of Istanbul? She signs the docket, and politely ushers the WAITER out...
I'm not sure. I'm improvising.
Jolly good. Enjoy.
INT AT THE DOOR...

ALITHEA watches as he walks off down the corridor. She pauses, looking this way and that... The world outside her room seems normal. She hangs the 'Do Not Disturb' sign. INT Latches the door shut. CLACK! All is quiet. As she moves back into the empty room... THE DJINN EMERGES from the BATHROOM! He is now the height of a VERY LARGE BASKETBALL PLAYER.
A more convenient size, I see.
Although it's a snug fit, he too is wearing a bathrobe - matching Alithea's.
I do what I can to fit in.
He is carrying a TRAY, adorned by a single flower in the neck of the Melted Bottle, and LADEN with DELICACIES.
(offering them) Please...
ALITHEA checks out the sherberts, the figs, and the pomegranates.
I needn't have ordered breakfast.
Cautiously, she selects a SMALL SHORTBREAD.
It is Nan-e nokhodchi. Chickpeas, cloves and pistachio. It will melt in your mouth.

THE DJINN watches as... Struggling with her disbelief, ALITHEA takes a bite. Savouring it... It is a wonder, and it WEAKENS her scepticism. THE DJINN lays out the tray on a small table. He POURS ROSE TEA for them both, before EASING his large frame onto the floor. She sits in the CHAIR OPPOSITE.
May I ask you something?
Anything.
How come you found your way into my bottle?
It's quite a story. That was my third incarceration.
You've been trapped in a bottle three times!
I may be a Djinn but I am also a fool with too great a fondness for the conversation of women.
He leans forward.
I need to be more careful in the future.
How were you caught in the first place?
By desire, how else?
Who was she?
Sheba.
The Queen of Sheba?
She was my kin.
She was a Djinn?!
Her mother was a Djinn.
Is that possible?
There are laws that allow the union of Djinn and mortals, but they cannot produce an immortal scion. As a donkey and a horse can only produce a seedless mule.
What did she look like?
Other than a thick glade of black hair on her legs, she looked like any other human... except, of course, she was...Sheba.
He says it with longing.
By all accounts, she was very beautiful.
She was not beautiful. She was Beauty itself.
He looks out the window... The LIGHT plays on HIS PROFILE.
I was, in every way, free. I would come in and out of her sleeping-chamber.
We EASE FORWARD on THE DJINN As he leans in... INT TO KISS THE NAPE of SHEBA'S NECK And thus, we are BACK IN TIME - 3000 YEARS.
And I knew as well as any of her female slaves the touches that made her shiver with bliss.

When his LIPS make contact, they form a VAPOUR which, as it cascades down her naked back, becomes a thousand miniature BUTTERFLIES...now morphing into schools of TINY FISH that tickle, pour and gush around the contours of her buttocks.
...Never have I wanted a creature so.
And she desired you in return?
INT BACK IN THE PRESENT - IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM...
I was her plaything, her confidant... I might have become more, but for Solomon.
King Solomon (I take it).
Blessed be his memory. He came from across the deserts to woo her.
Didn't she go to him?
(indignant) No. Never!
But it's in all the holy books. The stories. The paintings. Handel wrote music about it.
Madam, I was there. Solomon came to her.
INT A PANORAMIC VIEW OF...

An APPROACHING PARADE of envoys, artisans, beasts of burden festooned with gifts, and a vast army snaking back across the DESERT to the horizon. All of this is being watched by... THE QUEEN OF SHEBA from a WINDOW HIGH in her FORTRESS. Standing close behind this MAGNIFICENT YOUNG WOMAN, THE DJINN whispers in her ear.
(Spoken in Early Aramaic) You are Queen, free as a mighty bird, seeing all things with an even eye. How can you submit to the chains that bind you to a man?
Sweet cousin Djinn, there is no man who could so beguile me.

It is a phantasmagorical tableau. SHE is sitting high on her THRONE, surrounded by her courtiers and... A MENAGERIE, consisting not only of cheetahs, panthers, lions and monkeys, but also - in all shapes and sizes - Ifrits, Daemons and Djinn. Including ours. His eyes are on SHEBA as she gazes down at SOLOMON, masterfully playing his
He began with music. Then...

A STRING on his instrument SNAPS. His finger is bleeding. SOLOMON looks up at SHEBA, searching her face for empathy. He finds none. By way of magic, he repairs the string and forges on. As the music builds, we see that Solomon's instrument is enchanted. Its carvings animated by wood spirits - dryads - vocalising and playing accompaniment. It is exquisite and heart-stopping. Slowly drawing in the MENAGERIE of courtiers. We creep in on SHEBA'S noble, INSCRUTABLE face. The COURTIERS turn discreetly towards her...looking for the slightest response. On her LARYNX... a little gulp.
INT IN THE SLEEPING CHAMBER
While a handmaiden massages SHEBA'S HAIRLESS LEG, Sheba herself pours melted wax on her other thigh, covered still in a patterned glade of thick hair.
I did all that I could to dissuade her. But when she used the scented wax of the Jabassa Bee to remove the hair from her legs I knew that I was lost.
SHEBA listens intently as THE DJINN whispers in her ear.
But I, like a fool, went on telling her that her body was rich and lovely but her mind was richer and lovelier and more durable. And she agreed with all I said and dropped a hot tear.
THE DJINN gently licks away THE TEAR hovering on her cheek.
INT IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
ALITHEA is holding her cup of rose tea, but she is not drinking.

She began to set him tasks, which seemed impossible. To find a particular thread of red silk in the palace of a thousand rooms. To guess the secret name of her mother Djinn. To tell her what women most desire.
That does seem impossible.
He shrugs, ruefully.
Not for him. He could speak to the beasts of the earth and to the Djinn made of Subtle Fire.
Dragging a RED SILK THREAD over ancient stone.
He found ants to discover the thread of silk...
INT A CREATURE WITH METAL FEATHERS... Speaks FURTIVELY in SOLOMON's ear.
...and an Ifrit to whisper the mother's name.
ON SHEBA'S FACE...as SOLOMON draws her near.
Then he looked into her eyes, and told her what women most desire. She was astonished, and said that he was right.
Perched, unseen... THE DJINN watches SOLOMON and SHEBA far below - their bodies entwined.
And so she granted him what he most desired,
INT SHEBA...
Is astride SOLOMON. They roll into CLOSE UP and, underneath him now... She CRIES OUT in ECSTASY. In unison with her...
INT THE DJINN...

HOWLS in ANGUISH as he turns away from the heart-tearing sight. Disclosing himself to... Who - barely looking up from his prize - lifts a slender finger and begins to draw THE DJINN down towards them. The poor creature does all he can to resist, but the VORTEX is SO POWERFUL he seems to LIQUEFY, VAPORIZE, and thus is SUCKED ENTIRELY INTO... A SMALL BRASS BOTTLE within reach of THE LOVERS. (It is the same bottle from which Sheba poured the bees wax onto her thigh).
He was a great magician, and imprisoned me with a word of power in a brass bottle.

THE STOPPER of the bottle seals itself with the red silk thread. With one swift flourish, SOLOMON HURLS THE BOTTLE out the open window behind him. INT Before it drops to the ground, a GREAT RAVEN swoops, takes it in his beak and flies off across the vast expanse of DESERT. CLOSE ON... The UNFORGETTABLE FACE of SHEBA, glowing with sweat and pleasure.
She made no plea for me. I was nothing to her. A breath in a bottle.
INT THE BRASS BOTTLE...
Is carried in the CLAWS of the RAVEN, who soars over the masts of the EGYPTIAN FISHING DHOWS. The RAVEN releases his grip on the bottle...
INT THE BOTTLE breaks the surface of the water, and sinks into the darkness.
And so, I was cast into the Red Sea and languished for two and a half thousand years.
INT IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
ALITHEA waits for his painful memories to subside. Not sure what to say, she offers him the tray of delicacies. He declines. She resumes her seat.
Apart from sleep, what does one do in a bottle for two and a half thousand years?
Djinn don't sleep.
Now he's on his feet - pacing.
Then how do you manage?

For the first one hundred years, I rage against my fate. I pray to Boschkolo for release. When that does not work, I pray to any God I know and then to any God I may not know. And when, still, I find no answers, I spend my time in waking-dreams, revisiting all the stories of my life. When I have exhausted this many, many times,
I return to my rage and my prayer and finally... I play a trick on myself. She leans in.
I pray to remain in the bottle... I beseech Boschkolo to keep me always in the bottle.
Does it work?
He plonks himself down on the bed.
To yearn for nothing? To pretend to want nothing more than to be contained in a bottle? For a Djinn, it is the closest we ever come to death.
This gives her pause. Then...
Do you know the answer to her question?
What women most desire?
Yes.
This is where he wants her to go...
Don't you know? If you do not know already, I cannot tell you.
Well surely we don't all want the same thing.
Madam, your yearnings are not at all clear to me.
He nibbles a biscuit from the tray.
I'm at a point in my life where I have all I need. I dare say I am content, and gratefully so.
(probing) Tell me this then...are you a wife? A mother? A widow, perhaps?
I have no children, no siblings, no parents. I did once have a husband...
Aah! And what was the complexion of this husband?
His complexion? In the beginning, it was...glowing.
And in the ending?
It's not much of a story.
But it is your story. And it is always wise to understand those who have a hold on you. Please.
(shrugs) Well, we'd known each other from our youth. We married early.
INT ALITHEA'S PHOTO ALBUM - 2006

A Kodak print of ALITHEA and her HUSBAND in academic gowns, is being inserted between others of their LIFE TOGETHER. In each one he has an arm around her, while she stands awkwardly. Some have hand-written annotations: 'Faculty dinner, March 3, 1996. Jack ate fish, I had chicken. He liked my orange dress.'
In the beginning, we took pleasure in each other's minds. And bodies. We passed the years comfortably. Then...

A PREGNANCY TEST STICK - showing POSITIVE - is taped to the album. Then... A SONOGRAM image of a foetus in its first trimester. It is annotated... 'The first and last image of little Enzo.' The next page is blank. She closes the ALBUM and places it in a box - marked STORAGE.
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
But as it happens, it all evaporated and we became...less.
Where is he?
He's in Hackney with Emmeline Porter.
INT IN A LONDON TAXI...

ALITHEA is speed reading. The taxi brakes for traffic, causing her to look up. There on the CROWDED FOOTPATH, she sees HER HUSBAND and ANOTHER WOMAN - they can't keep their hands off each other. She seems enthralled by him. ALITHEA is momentarily surprised...
He told me I was incapable of reading feelings of reading his feelings.
She studies them from the back window of the taxi as they cross the road, laughing...
The way my brain is wired is both the source of my power...and my solitude.
We hold on HER FACE as she composes herself...then resumes her reading. INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
I suspect that's why I like stories. I find feelings through stories.
(enthusiastically) Perhaps you could wish for him back.
No. No. I thought I might grieve over loss and betrayal, but the fact is I was free. I felt like a prisoner coming blinking out of a dungeon.
I felt myself expand into the space of my own life. ALITHEA sips tea.
I could not wish for more. This is not what a Djinn offering wishes wants to hear.
You are a wise and cautious woman, Alithea. But we all have desires even if they remain hidden from us.
That's as maybe. But I am also a Narratologist - and that's going to be a problem. A very big problem.
His look is a query.
I know all the stories of trickster Djinn and how they manipulate wishing to their own ends. It is an unambiguous warning.
It throws THE DJINN.
(urgently) I am not one of them! I am God-fearing and honourable. I am here only to grant your heart's desire.
Even if that's true... can we rely on those called on to wish?
Huh?
How do you know you can rely on me?
(worried) I hope so. With you, I certainly hope so.
ALITHEA gets to her feet...

There's a silly little tale. I mean, you probably know it. (matter-of-factly) Three friends are lost at sea in a tiny boat. They pull up a magic fish who grants them each one wish. The first one, 'I wish I was at home with my wife'.
He vanishes. The second one, 'I wish I was playing in the fields with my children.' Off he goes. And the third one, 'I miss my friends.'
'I wish they were here.'
She SLAPS her hands together, as if to say - 'Just like that!' Looking at THE DJINN, firmly...
You've got it. There is no story about wishing that is not a cautionary tale. None end happily. Not even the ones that are supposed to be jokes.
You and I are the authors of this story, we can avoid all the traps.
She looks at him, clinically...
Well what if I made no wish at all?
Pardon?
What if I made no wish? This triggers a deep ANXIETY in him.
Umm...(That would be)...unusual. (That would be)...catastrophic!
He jumps to his feet, ENLARGING, banging his head on the CEILING LIGHT which swings violently as he stabilises to his more comfortable size. (This is a Djinn glitch.)
(agitated) I need to tell you about my next incarceration...
I'm all ears.
He HURRIES in the telling.
I will never know how my bottle came from the bottom of the Red Sea...

The IMAGES that follow match the URGENCY in his VOICE. INT WE SEE (AT SPEED) ... A FISHING NET dropped onto a shore. The net flops open to reveal small fish and an OCTOPUS entwined in what appears to be a TEAR-SHAPED STONE. It is the BRASS BOTTLE, now THICKLY ENCRUSTED after 2,500 years. Rough hands pull the octopus off the stone - which is tossed aside.
...to a palace in Constantinople. But I fancy, somehow, that it involved...
INT A SOLDIER - face down - is TURNED OVER... Revealing the skeleton of a ROTTING CORPSE. Maggots and worms slither around a tear-shaped stone, which is yanked from the EYE SOCKET.
...the killing of an Ottoman warrior... Next...
Uses the STONE as a pestle - grinding brightly coloured spices in a mortar.
A labourer slots THE STONE carefully into a fortress wall, banging it tight with a
...The Fall of an empire... Later...
INT The wall vibrates from the percussive forces of many cannon... Loosening THE STONE.
...And a girl in love.

INT GULTEN (18, slave girl) climbs THE WALL, using the TEAR-SHAPED STONE as her foothold. She peeks over the top to catch a glimpse of... The splendid PRINCE MUSTAFA, expertly riding his horse. He turns and LOOKS STRAIGHT AT HER. She DUCKS - knocking loose THE STONE. She falls to the ground. The STONE lands beside her. Cracked open - it reveals the BRASS BOTTLE inside.
And who are you? THE DJINN (V.O.) Gulten lived as a slave in the Courtyard of the Concubines in the Seraglio.
INT IN THE SECRET BATHROOM OF THE HAREM

GULTEN has chipped away most of the stone from the BOTTLE. Now she unpicks the hardened gunk from around the STOPPER... Which BURSTS OPEN...and drops to the floor, spinning. ERUPTING FORTH. GULTEN COWERS on the floor. When the THRUMMING stops and the room is silent, she shakily gets to her feet. GULTEN looks up at what must be THE DJINN'S TOWERING FIGURE, casting her in shadow. Her big eyes spasm. She topples backwards...
When I appeared to her she fainted...
His HUGE HAND reaches in and cradles her head before it smashes into the marble at the bottom of the stairs.
...and I had great trouble rousing her.
INT IT IS DAY...
GULTEN lies on her back in the bath, her eyes closed, THE DJINN supports her in the warm water. He murmurs in calming tones.
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
THE DJINN is less panicked now.
I made it clear that I meant her no harm.
He looks at ALITHEA...
For I was condemned to the bottle ALITHEA (impatiently) Until you got your three wishes.
Until she got hers.
INT IN THE SECRET BATHROOM
GULTEN opens her eyes and tearfully speaks her first wish.
The poor girl told me she was distractedly in love with a beautiful man, and she wished immediately
to find favour in his eyes...
INT THE IMPERIAL HALL
On a desk laden with a silversmith's tools, a GIFT is unwrapped... A finely crafted pair of RIDING SPURS - dangerous as they are elegant.
As it happened, the one she most desired was the splendid Mustafa. Prince Mustafa...
PRINCE MUSTAFA admires the spurs. He is delighted. Pull back to include his father - THE SULTAN, SULEIMAN - glowing with approval.
...eldest son of Suleiman the Magnificent and likely heir to his mighty throne.
They walk off, SULEIMAN'S arm around his prince.
Had I known what was to come I would have risked the Furies of Iblis and dissuaded her vehemently from her wish.
INT IN THE SECRET BATHROOM
THE DJINN delicately rubs his thumb and forefinger together and a thin stream of oil trickles into the BRASS BOTTLE. It's as if he is concocting lotion out of air.
But without thinking, I took my bottle and conjured oils to prepare her. Oils of enchantment. Once used only by Sheba.
GULTEN THE SLAVE has covered herself in a fine sheen of oil. THE DJINN pours a bit more into her hand for the finishing touches.
I cautioned her to hide the bottle,

lest its powers fall into other hands. He lifts the BULLNOSE - the WEIGHTY MARBLE SLAB at the top of the stairs. GULTEN takes the BRASS BOTTLE from him and HIDES IT in the space underneath. HE REPLACES THE SLAB. PRINCE MUSTAFA is asleep. THE DJINN floats in close to his ear...
I went to Mustafa. I whispered her name. He sent for her.
As he approaches two JANISSARIES guarding his CHAMBERS. They swing open the door to reveal... GULTEN WAITING FOR HIM. She is veiled more for allure than modesty.
It was so easy.
THE ASSEMBLED COURT - a shock to the eye - in its splendid and gaudy regalia.
As a Djinn, I am endlessly curious about the ways of humans. So in my spare time, I took to wandering the palace in search of its intrigues. From a height, we move down through this EXTRAVAGANZA...
And there among the Eunuchs, the Consorts and the Concubines, I first saw Hurrem - The Laughing One.
She has HER BACK TO US, as she charms the fawning group around her.
She too was a slave who had risen through the centre of them all to become the Sultan's favourite. Closing in on her.
The crowd hushes and looks up to a BALCONY. SULEIMAN has ARRIVED. HURREM turns and we see her fully for the first time...Her open face is high-spirited and, seemingly, guileless. THE DJINN (V.O.)
saw none but her.
The crowd parts as a LONG SILKEN LOOP is dropped from above. HURREM winds herself in the loop and is slowly - gracefully - lifted up to join the Sultan.
And she sought to protect his throne in favour of her own sons over his beloved Mustafa... All eyes are on HURREM.
Everyone is LAUGHING at this playfulness, including...
...And to this end she had the Prince watched by many probing eyes.
Behind MUSTAFA we see Hurrem's CONSPIRATORS. Among them is THE WATCHER - a Princess of the court - glaring at him. Resenting his presence.
INT ON THE BALCONY
SULEIMAN receives HURREM joyfully. As they head, arms entwined, to their private quarters... The CAMERA finds THE DJINN observing all this from his perch in the DOME ABOVE.
When I saw how Hurrem made a masterpiece of her manipulations I worried that my Gulten might be caught in this web. LATER
INT GULTEN emerges from Mustafa's CHAMBERS and enters the SHADOWY PASSAGE. THE DJINN has been waiting for her.
I tried to warn her. To be careful. But she had already decided on her second wish.
No longer timid, she looks him in the eyes.
I wish to be pregnant.
With Mustafa? Please no. Please wait!
Djinn, this is my heart's desire. Grant me my wish. Now.
He sags, defeated...
Such a mistake. Because at this moment, Suleiman, - blessed be his name is being undermined.
His warriors believe he is going soft.
INT IN THE BATHING POOLS OF THE IMPERIAL HAREM...
Gulten, in the meantime, saw no reason why she should remain unseen. Concubines, Princesses, their attendants, eunuchs and female slaves - going about their daily routine:
GULTEN is pouring POMEGRANATE JUICE. She is IGNORED by those whom she serves - among them...
Who is suddenly startled by an EXPLOSIVE LAUGH... It's GULTEN! Calling attention to herself. Fully-clothed and holding the SPOUTED POT... She jumps into the BATHING POOL!
Given she was carrying the son of the next Sultan...
ALL EYES are now on her as she emerges... PROUDLY caressing her now evident PREGNANCY.
Despite my warnings
she parades her newly swollen breasts and belly... Defiantly, she hurls the POT into the pool, and struts off.
...and the whispers soon reached the seraglio. The terrible plottings move all too quickly.

A master of calligraphy - is crafting a love poem. HURREM wraps her arm around him and draws him to... A FILIGREED SCREEN... Through which they spy on PRINCE MUSTAFA - surrounded by his JANNISSARIES in the Throne Room below.
Hurrem fuels the rumours that the military want to take his throne and replace him with Mustafa. The Prince has become a pawn in the ceaseless game of power.
One bows to KISS the Prince's SLEEVE. AN INK WELL... Has SPILLED across the CALLIGRAPHY. A puddle of BLACK INK blots out SULEIMAN'S poem.
INT IN THE BED CHAMBERS
HURREM holds SULEIMAN'S head to her chest and soothes his brow. NOW, THE SULTAN stands tall and grave as HURREM unwinds a LONG GOLD SILK CORD binding his fine robes.
Suleiman the Magnificent.
Patron and Protector of Empires. Suleiman the Father was left with a choice that he knows will break his heart.
INT A BOW STRING
Is unhitched from the Sultan's bow.
INT IT IS NIGHT
A HORSE AND RIDER pull up in front of a...
PALATIAL WAR TENT
PRINCE MUSTAFA dismounts. As the Stable Master corrals his horse, he hands his sword to one of the JANISSARIES and strides eagerly into the tent.
Prince Mustafa comes innocently
into the presence of his father. To reassure him of his loyalty.
(in Ottoman Turkish) My Sultan.
SULEIMAN does not turn in response to this greeting. As PRINCE MUSTAFA bends to kiss the sleeve of his father's robe, SULEIMAN yanks it away.
Father? THE DJINN (V.O.) ...And The Mutes are waiting for him.

Out of the shadows behind him, THE ASSASSINS emerge and MUSTAFA realises something is DREADFULLY WRONG. In a swift, highly-practiced 'dance', two tongueless MUTES wrap Suleiman's BOW STRING around MUSTAFA'S NECK. This GARROTE is hitched to the tent poles by the SILK CORD. As they drag him back, another two ASSASSINS grab MUSTAFA'S LEGS and PLOUGH his SPURS deep into the carpet - ANCHORING HIM.
He cried out to his Janissaries who loved him...
INT OUTSIDE THE TENT...
THE JANISSARIES bow their heads - numb to the sounds of his dying.
...but his voice was crushed
and his breath was stopped
INT FROM ABOVE...
We watch MUSTAFA taking his FINAL BREATHS. Only when the SON falls silent, does his FATHER turn to look... His face DISTRAUGHT.
INT IN THE SECRET BATHROOM
GULTEN is ENTIRELY HAPPY. A brazier warms her. With a PEACOCK FEATHER, she playfully wafts incense around her belly and murmurs a pretty song to her unborn baby. THE DJINN bursts in, FRANTIC...
Gulten! Gulten! They are coming for you. Make a wish!
GULTEN leaps to her feet, knocking over the BRAZIER.
Just one more wish!
She is struggling to understand...
Why?
Gulten! They are coming to kill you.
The Prince will protect me!
THE DJINN advances towards her.
There is nothing he can do. Make a wish!
His desperation scares her. She thrusts out the FEATHER to ward him off. But because of the fallen brazier, it is now aflame...and it burns her hand.
He loves me.
Gulten. He is dead! He's dead!
Her knees buckle. She is struck silent. THE DJINN eases off - afraid she will collapse. She BACKS AWAY, through an open DOOR, which she BOLTS SHUT.
All who cherish him are dead. Hurrem is coming for you.
THE DJINN pleads with her from HIS SIDE of the door.
Int. WE ARE IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
He is on his feet - his back to ALITHEA - calling out, as if to Gulten.
MAKE A WISH!!! Save yourself Gulten!
He takes a furtive glance at ALITHEA... Is the story having an effect? Yes. She is RIVETED. BACK - FIVE CENTURIES EARLIER...
Int. IN THE SECRET BATHROOM
THE DJINN listens... But there is only SILENCE.
A few words and she could have been free to bear her child in safety,

and I, to spirit away - at last to the Realm of Djinn. He twists the handle, effortlessly breaking the heavy bolt. The DOOR SWINGS OPEN. He glimpses GULTEN at the far end of a long, dank tunnel. She is RUNNING AWAY. THE DJINN charges after her. NOW...
INT AT A SUDDEN TURN IN THE CORRIDOR
THE DJINN has caught up to GULTEN and is about to grab her, when... She CRASHES into a PACK of LEATHER-CLAD ASSASSINS.
But she ran into the hands of The Assassins. I was about to take them by force...
They throw a SACK over her. One of the ASSASSIN'S moves directly into THE DJINN'S path and, by the intensity of his glare, forces him to stop.
...when I was blocked by a Follower of Iblis.

In a manner that is beyond reason...this 'ASSASSIN' TILTS 180 degrees so that he is now hanging from the ceiling, UPSIDE-DOWN like a BAT. IN THE NEXT INSTANT...He is no longer human, but a SMALL, SHRIVELLED CREATURE with the MANY EYES of a spider, and mottled reptilian skin. The DAEMON IFRIT drops to the ground. Standing smaller than a house cat, its limbs articulate like an insect's. Its tentacles - writhing, gelatinous, self-sodomizing. THE DJINN cowers - TERRIFIED to his core. JUST BEYOND... He can see the EXECUTIONERS bundle a STRUGGLING GULTEN into a SACK and carry her off. The IFRIT speaks in a series of clicking sounds, tongue inflections and claps - like a demented cricket.
You are not wanted here, Djinn. You cannot change her story. If she does not wish... you are doomed.
INT CLOSE ON ALITHEA...
As if she is witnessing this. Then... A VERY FAST - JOLTING - PULL BACK from the Agatha Christie room... Into DARKNESS.
INT THE PALACE WALLS
The EXECUTIONERS carry THE SACK containing GULTEN to the BASTION of the fortress - the night sky above, the moonlit sea below. They HURL HER over the high wall and into the Bosphorus.
INT THE DJINN...

Is hunched, frozen in pain. The IFRIT - FOLLOWER OF IBLIS - snarls contemptuously. After a long moment, when all is silent and still... This phantasmagorical creature BURSTS - like the swollen egg sac of a mother spider... Disgorging THOUSANDS of SPIDERLINGS who scramble in a thousand directions into the darkness of the tunnel. This releases THE DJINN, who... RUSHES down the warren of tunnels, to...
INT THE CLIFF EDGE
GULTEN!!!

He LEAPS OFF the FORTRESS WALL. His black cloak slips off his back and billows away...as he torpedoes into the sea. CAMERA LINGERS on the MIST, drifting across the WATER. THE EMPTY SACK, gliding past CAMERA... As THE DJINN hauls GULTEN back to the surface. THE DJINN cradles the DEAD GULTEN in his arms.
She made no wish to save herself. No wish was made - to save us both. It takes time, but we notice...
THE DJINN is FADING AWAY... His image, TENUOUS...a NEGATIVE SPACE in the mist. Soon... HE IS INVISIBLE Leaving the sodden, arched CORPSE of GULTEN - ALONE ON THE ROCKS.
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
Over ALITHEA'S shoulder on THE DJINN, as he turns to her...
So, there I was - or there I was not, you might say. Almost emancipated. Tethered to this world by a third wish, unperformed.
ALITHEA remains still. Processing what she's heard.
You realise, don't you? that you've just told me a story of a woman who was doomed as a consequence of the wishes she made.
Yes. But her failure to complete the wishes also doomed me.
Could nobody else complete the wish? He sits on the bed...
(calmly) That was my hope.
And that would finally liberate you?
It was my only hope.
But you were rendered invisible.
Like a ghost, wandering unseen.
INT IN THE SECRET BATHROOM...
And your bottle lay hidden under the loosened stone known only to the dead Gulten. We linger on the BULLNOSE TILE. Impenetrable.
Yes. It was a predicament...
INT IN A LABYRINTH OF CORRIDORS...
THE CAMERA IS THE UNSEEN DJINN'S POINT-OF-VIEW It LOOMS TALL as it FOLLOWS various inhabitants of the Seraglio.
I tried to attract the attention of someone, anyone who might help me...

CAMERA approaches... A KITCHEN HAND carrying a slab of meat. As the DJINN'S POV gets closer, it is repelled - like a magnet bouncing off another of the same polarity. The CAMERA is thrown backwards through the CORRIDOR WALL, and then... THROUGH the BODY and ARMOUR of a JANISSARY, standing guard outside. The JANISSARY is ENTIRELY UNAWARE of the DJINN'S PRESENCE.
My stars, how I tried!
'He' RUSHES towards a CONCUBINE, bathing in the IMPERIAL HAREM. Again, he passes frictionless THROUGH the BODY and INTO the WATER without making a splash!
I follow their scent, their every step. Willing. Pleading. Screaming! Anything to draw them to me!
INT NOW...

The DJINN'S POV is frenetic. It hones in on a Zaouli-style DANCER. To the rapid-fire beat of his DRUMMERS - his legs pound a tray of coloured dust at his feet. We SURGE directly into the Dancer's MASKED FACE... Which seems to morph - briefly melting around us - ELUDING us... We have passed RIGHT THROUGH HIM, and turn to look at the back of his head. Like all the others, he is oblivious as he dances away from us, OUT OF the PLANE of FOCUS. INT A BIRD'S-EYE VIEW OF THE SERAGLIO
And I do this piteously for one hundred years. With every failure, my will begins to fade.

INT THE DJINN'S POINT-OF-VIEW... IS BLURRY NOW, and the SOUNDS MUFFLED, as we approach and pass by the various INCUMBENTS of the COURT. And there - in all the blur - we glimpse a SHARPNESS in the image. It is a CHILD - SCAMPERING in and out of the crowd.
Then, in 1620, hope comes in the form

of a boy with a sword. INT THE DJINN'S POINT-OF-VIEW follows... THE BOY - MURAD, seven years old - through the IMPERIAL BATHS and... INTO A CORRIDOR Suddenly, MURAD stops and... Turns to LOOK AT CAMERA! WE SURGE through him. The boy's face MELTS around us. We come out the other side, and unlike the futile attempts of the past He SENSES the PRESENCE of THE DJINN! He turns towards us, waving his sword like a blind man with a white cane. As THE DJINN'S POINT-OF-VIEW backs away...down the corridor... THE BOY FOLLOWS, leaving behind his playmates - their image blurred. With increasing urgency, CAMERA LEADS THE BOY through... THE LABYRINTH OF CORRIDORS Now... HE IS RUNNING TOWARDS US - trying to keep pace. THE DJINN (V.O.) By some means, this boy senses me and I am able to draw him to the stone. THE DJINN'S POINT-OF-VIEW ascends a narrow stairwell and passes backwards through A DOOR, as it melts momentarily around us. And WE WAIT - on the other side - near the BULLNOSE TILE.
INT THE SECRET BATHROOM...

IS NOW IN FOCUS AND THE CAMERA IS NO LONGER SUBJECTIVE The LATCH turns. The door opens, blowing away dead leaves. MURAD enters the room which has been undisturbed for one hundred years. Agitated by a gnawing sense of purpose, he drags his sword across the marble. When it crosses the BULLNOSE, it makes a different sound. MURAD stops. He stares at the slab. Without knowing why, he has a compulsion to expose what's underneath. Wrapping his small fingers under the bullnose, he tries to lift it - but it's too heavy even for a strong seven-year-old. He wedges his sword in the back end of THE MARBLE SLAB and attempts to lever it open. As he struggles, he yells for someone...
IBRAHIM!

THE SLAB will not budge. He runs off, leaving the sword jammed upright. Moments pass. MURAD returns, dragging his hefty younger brother, IBRAHIM (five years old). Together they push against the sword, DISLODGING THE SLAB THE TINIEST
That's when we hear the voice of a woman...
Murad! Ibrahim!
And just as I'm about to be delivered into their hands, their mother finds them.
Come away from here!
She is Kosem, widow of the Sultan Ahmed the First. And the boys are next in line for the throne.

IBRAHIM runs to his mother, while MURAD defiantly retrieves his sword. KOSEM tries to grab him, but MURAD struggles free of his long robe and runs off REVEALING the patterned glade of THICK HAIR on his LEGS.
When I see the hair on his legs, I know that somewhere
MURAD - older again - swaggers into the THRONE ROOM. Both the SULTAN'S CROWN and his SWORD are far too big for him.
But at the age of eleven he ascends the throne as Sultan Murad IV. And caught up by the usual intrigues, he is even more lost to me. MURAD, a man now. A GENERAL - hardened and fearsome.
At twenty, he leads his armies to war...
He MANIACALLY LEAPS from HORSE TO HORSE as he swings his wide-blade SWORD with BRUTAL EFFECT.
He battles alongside his men in the Caucasus and Mesopotamia. Stories are told of his recklessness - even with his own life I despair of ever seeing him again.
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
THE DJINN searches ALITHEA'S face for any sign of empathy.
Hope is a monster, Alithea. And I am its plaything.
So he died?
Not in battle.
ALITHEA is intrigued.
Back in Istanbul, Kosem, has to protect the throne. She has to protect Ibrahim.
The little brother?
Yes.
IBRAHIM (now 18 years old), naked and hesitant - being led into a PLEASURE DOME.
He is last of the Ottoman Line. He has to produce male children. So Kosem locks him in a cage lined entirely with sable.
Two slender CONCUBINES drape IBRAHIM in an VOLUMINOUS SABLE CLOAK. It causes him to grin blissfully.
Quite the prison.
One he would never want to leave.
KOSEM bolts the door.
It debauches him. Royally.
He believes the greater the expanse of flesh the more intense the pleasure.
INT IN THE GOLDEN CAGE

IBRAHIM inspects a LINE of CORPULENT FEMALES, as if they were livestock. Sniffing them, prodding their flesh with a stick to measure the wobble. THE DJINN (V.O.) So Kosem seeks out beauties - voluptuous and immense and brings them to his couch. INT IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
My fate turns - specifically - on this fetish.
How's that? INT SOMEWHERE IN A CONQUERED LAND...
You'll see.
MURAD inspects a LINE of A THOUSAND CAPTIVES. All of them bound, on their knees, with their necks exposed to A THOUSAND EXECUTIONERS, who raise their SWORDS and wait.
MURAD'S terrible blade is poised above his chosen victim, a thick-necked Persian
MURAD IV brings down HIS SWORD...
INT THE DOORS of the THRONE ROOM FLING OPEN
As COURTIERS of all kinds STAMPEDE to safety... When they are gone, WE ENTER through the OPEN DOOR to be met with the sight of a PASHA and an elderly VIZIER - LYING DEAD - at the foot of the throne.

Murad is back. Though he returns a conqueror he cannot shed his robes of blood. War, indeed, has rotted his soul. MURAD, panting from exertion, sits on his throne. Not bothering to wipe the blood from his sword. KOSEM is the only one who hasn't run. She stands tall and very still, watching her
THEN...
She makes a subtle gesture of obeisance and backs out of the room, quietly closing the door behind her.
INT IN THE EMPTY LABYRINTH OF CORRIDORS

WE RESUME THE DJINN'S OUT OF FOCUS POV We hear the slow advance of a HORSE. CLIP. CLOP. CLIP. CLOP. THE HOOVES leave bloodstains on the stone floor. CAMERA rises to find MURAD in the saddle. HE alone is IN FOCUS.
I wait until he is alone. I am determined to draw him back to the stone. MURAD glances back at the camera... Sensing the WILL of the INVISIBLE Djinn - just as he did as a boy.
I don't want to interrupt, but I do have a question...
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
THE DJINN pauses.
Did it matter to you what kind of wish such a man might make? One so insatiable.
No.
Not even if it was profoundly evil?
Not if it meant my freedom.
THE DJINN sees that this bothers her.
The truth is - he has other things on his mind.
He believes he's invincible.
TURNS AWAY and CONTINUES on his horse down the corridor.
INT THE DOOR TO THE GOLDEN CAGE
His SWORD at the ready, MURAD yanks the massive BOLT and is about to open the door when someone STAYS HIS HAND. It's KOSEM.
Why waste your sword, my Lion?
She slides open a PEEPHOLE in the centre of the door, and invites MURAD to look inside... He observes IBRAHIM, luxuriating in a Bacchanalia of OILED FLESH, food and smelly fur.
Ibrahim! He comes to them, docile and flatulent.
(in Ottoman Turkish) Big Brother...
IBRAHIM reaches his filthy hand through the peephole to caress MURAD'S FACE. MURAD steps back in disgust.
He's a baby. How could he ever rule?
IBRAHIM grabs his mother's breast. MURAD storms off. KOSEM watches him. She locks the peephole and bolts the door.
Kosem needs to stop him.
Somehow, she has to distract him from his bloodlust with other gratifications.
InINT IN THE THRONE ROOM

MURAD drains WINE from a GOBLET. He tosses it into the air, swings at it with his sword, and MISSES. It smashes to the floor - already littered with BROKEN GLASS. THE DJINN (V.O.) First, she arranges for him to be perpetually drunk. Immediately, ANOTHER tumbler - full to the brim - is thrust into his hand. THE DJINN (V.O.) And then she tries something very shrewd.
INT IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
...Something you might enjoy.
ALITHEA leans in...
She sends to find, from all corners of the empire, the best storytellers.
She acknowledges this with a faint smile.
INT SEVEN STORYTELLERS...

From different lands, have assembled around the THRONE. ONE OF THEM is presenting his jocular tale. Murad's Warriors and the other Storytellers - can't stop laughing. But not MURAD. He is glaring, agitated...chipping at the floor with the point of his
Those who are not persuasive... INT IN A TINY BOAT...
Another HAPLESS STORYTELLER is rowing frantically across the Bosphorus.
...flee in fear or fall to his impatience. TWO ARROWS have landed - one on the floor of the boat, and the other in his lower leg.
INT FROM HIGH ON THE FORTRESS WALLS...

MURAD FIRES his TURKISH BOW once more. The arrow arcs across the sky and we watch as it finds its target. The STORYTELLER is DEAD. NOW... INT THE THRONE ROOM IS EMPTY, BUT FOR... MURAD and the LAST REMAINING STORYTELER - an OLD MAN.
There is only one who has the ability to enchant him. To soothe with stories.

To hold him hostage to their unfolding. For the first time, we see MURAD without a sword in his hand. He is reclining on his THRONE with eyes closed. The OLD STORYTELLER builds to the climax of this night's 'episode'. And... MURAD bursts into LAUGHTER. The OLD STORYTELLER smiles back at him.
INT OUTSIDE THE DOORS TO THE THRONE ROOM
The Warriors, the Courtiers, the Grand Vizier and KOSEM are waiting. Closed-out. Listening to the laughter.
INT INSIDE THE THRONE ROOM
Propped up against a column... We find MURAD'S SWORD. It is heavily rusted and being COBWEBBED by a small spider.
This is his only friend. And that friendship turns to love.
MURAD is on the floor at the OLD STORYTELLER'S feet, looking up at him... Spellbound. Drunk.
Since there is nothing else for me to do, I listen gratefully. For I, too, love being lost in his stories.
Dissipated, shrunken and jaundiced yellow - he looks decades older than his twentyseven years.
When the old man dies, all in the palace flee to the streets.
For they fear Murad's grief will incur fresh murder. But he just sits and howls, and drinks... He is keening over the CORPSE of the OLD STORYTELLER.
...until he is empty. INT THE DJINN'S SUBJECTIVE POINT-OF-VIEW
And my patience is rewarded. For in this state, I am finally able to draw him back to the secret bathroom.

The wildly swaying silhouette of MURAD approaches. His ATAXIC GAIT is so severe he can barely hold himself upright. Nevertheless, he follows the CAMERA urgently down the corridor which leads to... THE SECRET BATHROOM As before, we PASS BACKWARDS through the DOOR as it melts momentarily around us...
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
I know where this is going...
THE DJINN looks at her...
...He is too weak to lift the stone.
Too weak even to turn the latch.
INT INSIDE THE SECRET BATHROOM
For a few moments, THE DOOR LATCH jiggles feebly... Then stops.
So, he leaves...and drinks himself to permanent sleep.
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
This is not what she expected.
Oh.
And there I am, left to my own oblivion. With no one to hear my voice. No one to know me. Nor feel me. Nor sense me.
He lets it sink in...
You can't imagine.
He eases closer to her...slowly...imperceptibly.
Actually, I can.
Can you imagine the loneliness? How it might overwhelm?
(quietly) I can.
We exist only if we are real to others. (Fixing his gaze on her) Do you agree?
ALITHEA is mesmerized.
I do.
This then is our fate, if you make no wish at all. I will be caught between worlds. Invisible and alone for all of time.
He leans in...
(softly) Make a wish, Alithea. Make it your heart's desire.
She is utterly still. Spellbound. THE DJINN is alive with anticipation.
I'd be more careful, if I were you. On his look...
Obviously you managed to find your way out. This takes the wind out of his sails.
More or less.
I'm inclined to think I'm in the presence of a trickster.
He shies back.
That would be so much better. My work would be so much easier. But the truth is, I am just an idiot, who has been extravagantly unlucky.
I'll have to take your word for that.
They glare at each other. It's a stand-off.
So Ibrahim, I suppose, becomes Sultan...
He shrugs. INT IBRAHIM IS HAULED, WHIMPERING... From the FETID DARKNESS of the GOLDEN CAGE.

Ibrahim has to be dragged to the throne. This sorry mess is overseen by KOSEM. She is now the EFFECTIVE RULER of the OTTOMAN EMPIRE. INT VALIDE SULTAN KOSEM WATCHES, THROUGH A GILDED SCREEN, AS... IBRHIM, in full Sultanic regalia - sits on THE THRONE - cushioned by his PLUMPEST CONCUBINES. He looks UTTERLY BEFUDDLED.
He appoints one of his concubines Governor of Damascus. INT THE LARGEST and FLESHIEST OF HIS CONCUBINES...
Makes her way down the labyrinth of corridors.
Her name is 'Sugar Lump'. By every measure, his favourite. And had she not been free to roam...
...She would not have found the secret bathroom.
SEKERPARE - 'SUGAR LUMP' soaks in the bath.
And had she not decided to take a bath, it would not have overfilled.
WATER spills out of the bathing pool, onto the marble.
And had she not been careless
as she made her way across the floor... She heaves her frame out of the bathing pool and takes a few LUMBERING STEPS towards us.
She would not have slipped...
Her LEGS SLIDE from underneath her.
Smashed the stone...
As she lands, the SHOCKWAVES FRACTURE the BULLNOSE TILE.
...and found my bottle.
Aah.
INT BACK IN THE SECRET BATHROOM

SUGAR LUMP extracts the BRASS BOTTLE from her rump. Baffled, she scrutinises this unexpected object. Then... In a reversal of the moment we last saw him (fading into invisibility upon Gulten's death)... THE DJINN EMERGES IN THE BATHROOM STEAM BEHIND HER. First as a negative shape...then FULLY PRESENT!
INT IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
To tell the truth, I should have been more dignified. But I began to beg shamelessly...
INT IN THE SECRET BATHROOM
SUGAR LUMP gets to her feet, GAPING UP AT HIM. THE DJINN
Please, fine lady my situation is grave. It's desperate. You must help me.
You smell.
Wish. Wish for anything. Wish for everything!
I want nothing to do with devious Djinn. This is more than petulance. It is a deep loathing.
Anything you hanker for? There must be! Wish it! Speak it! Tell me!! NOW!!
I WISH YOU WERE BACK IN YOUR BOTTLE.
AT THE BOTTOM OF THE BOSPHORUS!!
INT DEEP UNDER WATER
FISH SCATTER to reveal THE BOTTLE, stranded on the SEA FLOOR.
INT IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
He looks at ALITHEA...
"I wish you were back...in your bottle... at the bottom of the Bosphorus." (deferentially) So here I am - fallen into your careful hands.
(irritated) Seems we cannot escape each other.
You have me at your mercy.
This wishing is a hazardous art. 'I wish' brings infinite unravellings.
Not necessarily.
She stands up.
It's there in all your own stories!
I know, but She's pacing now.
You say you're not a trickster. You say you and I are the authors of this story, but I'm unable to write myself out of it.
Correct.
Alithea has lost patience with him. If he is a CREATURE of EMOTION, she is a CREATURE of REASON.
Why don't you just hop back into your bottle and I'll give it to someone more gullible, someone more desperate, more greedy?!
I'm not getting back in the bottle.
Why not?!
I'm not getting back in the bottle!!
Well, I am not making three wishes.
Then you're sending me to my oblivion.
You're impossible!
And you are giving me a headache.
Alright. Here's what I'll do...
She takes a deep breath.
I will make three wishes.
(sceptical) Before you die?
Right now. One after the other. Ready? Number one I wish your headache were gone.
She scans his face for a sign of relief. He stares at her. Blankly. She reaches for her tea cup.
Number two, I wish for a sip of this tea.
She sips the tea.
And finally, I wish for another one of those...
She takes a CHICKPEA BISCUIT from the bowl and pops it in her mouth. THE DJINN is seething.
You mock me.
(what's the problem?) Three wishes. Perfectly simple. And theoretically...safe.
I was imprisoned by Solomon precisely because I cried out my heart's desire. Only by granting you yours can I earn my release.
I appreciate the symmetry. But I cannot - for the life of me summon up one eligible wish. And you are demanding three. He's had enough.
Is there any life in you? Are you even alive?!
He stands, looming over her.
(unfazed) You know in some cultures, absence of desire means enlightenment.
Then you are a pious fool.
She glares at him.
If I'm content, why tempt fate?
And you're a coward.
Don't goad me.

(infuriated) There is no Human, no Angel, nor Djinn who wouldn't grasp the chance to fulfil their deepest longings and I am saddled with the one who claims to want nothing at all! Alithea Binnie, you are a liar!!
You know, I'm beginning to wish we'd never met.
He FLINCHES!
No. No! Non! NYET! Don't say that!!

With each word, his body distorts. This time the Djinn-glitch is so SEVERE. The TV and lights flicker and Cesm-i bulbul bottle in Alithea's hand EXPLODES! We may notice a SMALL CUT on her cheek - in the shape of an Arabic numeral '3'. ALITHEA is surprised by level of his PANIC. His breathing slows.
So, that's happened to you before. And it was bad.
He looks at her.
It was bad. It was bitter. It was the cruellest wish of all.
You were undone by silliness. Yet again.
I'm here...
He points to the shards of the CESM-I BULBUL BOTTLE on the floor.
...because of a genius.
Who was it this time?
She was Zefir.
He begins to gather SHARDS of the broken bottle in his hand.
Rarely among humankind has there been such a wonder.
But you're here as a result of her folly.
I ended up in this as a consequence of Zefir.
And this is the story you've been avoiding telling me all along?
This is the story I've avoided telling even myself.
A CARD APPEARS... "THE CONSEQUENCE OF ZEFIR"
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
ALITHEA holds up a finger, gesturing 'Wait!' She grabs the bowl of CHICKPEA BISCUITS from the tray, and sits on the bed. About to eat them - like popcorn. She is ready. IT IS THE 1850's - TURKEY
INT RIDING IN A HORSE-DRAWN CARRIAGE...
We find a passenger, a WOMAN in a NIQAB, covering everything but her HAUNTED EYES. ZEFIR, looking at the world passing outside.
Zefir was a foundling. Married at twelve to a wealthy merchant.
Pull back to reveal THE MERCHANT next to her - an old man in an expensively tailored suit.
He was much older than she, and kind enough, if you think keeping someone like a bird in a cage is kind.
In the seat opposite are two more WIVES, shrouded in niqab, staring at ZEFIR.
There were two older wives who didn't like her and didn't talk to her at all.
Int. A SPECTACULAR WOODEN MANSION ON THE BOSPHORUS STRAIT

White and ornate. The CARRIAGE pulls up at the entrance. The OLD MERCHANT is helped out, followed by the THREE WIVES, who hurry along a CANOPIED WALKWAY which hides them from public gaze until they enter the front door.
INT IN THE OPULENT ENTRANCE HALL
ZEFIR grabs a tray of food from the hands of a waiting SERVANT and storms up the stairs. She is watched by the HOUSE STAFF, and the OTHER WIVES.
Everyone, including the servants, seemed to be mocking her. She had neither etiquette, nor learning. She grew to no great beauty...
ZEFIR is now at the TOP FLOOR and opens the door to...
INT HER LOFT
She enters. BOLTS the internal locks and VIOLENTLY DISROBES, tossing aside her niqab in a rage.
And she was angry without knowing why.

HOLD ON HER FACE as she comes up for air - trying to calm her breath. LIGHT streams in from one high dormer window - the only window into her UNIQUE 'CAGE' from which she cannot see out or be seen. THE DJINN (V.O.)

INT A LARGE FISH IS CUT OPEN The DJINN'S BRASS BOTTLE spills out, GLEAMING - cleaned by the acids of the gut. THE COOK holds it up, surprised. The OLD MERCHANT nearby, fastidiously inspecting his KITCHEN - approaches for a closer look.
INT IN ZEFIR'S LOFT - EVENING
...My bottle came to her as a love-token from her husband.

The OLD MERCHANT undresses as he watches his YOUNG WIFE unwrap her gift... THE DJINN'S BRASS BOTTLE. ZEFIR nods cursorily and goes to her COLLECTION of at least one hundred FLASKS and JARS - most of them GLASS. She places THE BRASS BOTTLE among them.
When she had finished satisfying him and was finally alone...
INT LATER THAT NIGHT
She takes a CARVING CHISEL from her toolbox, picks up the BOTTLE and chips away at the seal.

...she managed to prise it open. As The MAKINGS of THE DJINN blasts from the bottle, CAMERA pulls back to illustrate the process. Each stage is... ANIMATED, AS IF FROM A JOURNAL, IN SEPIA INK. First, an arrow indicates the mouth of the bottle and the following description... Stage 1 Electromagnetic waves
INT THE EXTERIOR OF THE MERCHANT'S MANSION

We favour the CORNER TURRET on the TOP FLOOR... ZEFIR'S LOFT, ABOVE THE WATER. Our view is largely obscured by SHUTTERED WINDOWS, but - by the play of light, and the sound of THRUMMING - we sense THE DJINN EMERGING FULLY from the BOTTLE!
INT IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
ALITHEA leans forward, taking this in.
It was as if she was waiting for me. I saw at once that she was sharp. She saw that I was desperate for freedom and conversation. I told her my story, as I have told you.
THE DJINN'S eyes are on ALITHEA.
And she revealed herself to me by the things she had made...
INT BACK IN ZEFIR'S LOFT - MORNING

It is full of intriguing clutter. Her room is a haphazard museum of a lonely life. We are looking at INTRICATE EMBROIDERIES. They depict a SHAH and his quest for flight - by means of FOUR HUNGRY EAGLES tethered above his THRONE. Lumps of MEAT dangling above them. As THE DJINN admires the brilliance of her craft, ZEFIR invites him to look into an INGENIOUS ANIMATION DEVICE she has invented. It is a 19th Century version of a GIF. She turns a geared handle, and the embroidered EAGLES LIFT THE SHAH into the AIR. Over and over. THE DJINN laughs with DELIGHT. And ZEFIR delights in his pleasure. NOW... She UNDRAPES a small-scale model of an experimental FLYING MACHINE an AIRSCREW made of cloth and wood. THE DJINN (V.O.) She could have been remembered like the genius da Vinci,

She was a great artist, but no one saw her art. She turns a spindle and THE BLADES ROTATE, creating enough energy to LAUNCH IT high into the vaulted loft. When it descends, THE DJINN 'hovers' the AIRSCREW above his palm - gently returning it to ZEFIR. WIDE SHOT... THE DJINN listens to ZEFIR as she paces, agitated, like a caged animal.
She told me she was eaten up with unused power. She thought she might be a witch except, she said, if she were a man, her intellect would have been ordinarily accepted.
As she voices her frustration, she rhythmically whacks her hand with the Airscrew then tosses it aside.
She was a woman ardent for learning, and I knew what her first wish would be...
ZEFIR, her eyes glistening with hope...
I want knowledge. I wish to acquire all knowledge that is useful, beautiful and true.
INT IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
And it delighted me to fulfill this wish. The insinuation is not lost on ALITHEA.
AN ARABIC MANUSCRIPT... - NIGHT

ZEFIR'S FINGERS glide across THE PAGE. After little more than a second, she flips to the next. HER EYES DART. Her leg jiggles with nervous energy as she READS with STARTLING RAPIDITY - like Alithea did at the beginning of this story.
So I taught her histories, philosophies, languages and poetry.
A COMPLEX GEOMETRICAL DIAGRAM - DAY
ZEFIR is studying Kepler's Laws of Planetary Motion. Using a compass and stylus, she is drawing the Earth's elliptical orbit around the sun.
I taught her astronomy and mathematics, which was bliss to her.
While ZEFIR focuses intensely on her work, THE DJINN serves her a tray laden with DELICACIES. He is happy.
I brought her books and writings, Which we hid in her collection of bottles...

He places a RED GLASS BOTTLE on a silver tray, and invites her to TAP IT LIGHTLY. THE BOTTLE seems to 'melt' into countless tiny beads, spreading thin across the tray, like mercury. ZEFIR carefully places a well-loved BOOK in the centre of the tray. The tiny beads REGROUP, rapidly, and ENVELOP the book in glass. She whispers a single, mysterious word (Sheeba) and - just like that - the RED BOTTLE is reformed, sealed, with the book trapped inside. ZEFIR SMILES. CAMERA RISES ABOVE ZEFIR AND THE DJINN...
She could always call on Aristotle from the red glass jar, or Euclid from the green,
without needing me to re-embody them.
They are in vibrant conversation, surrounded by these COUNTLESS BOTTLES of
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
The memory surges through him.
We had the whole world in her room. And I lost my heart to her.
Hold ALITHEA...Her larynx...A little gulp.
It was my bliss to make her happy. To see her flourish. Then...
INT ANOTHER BOTTLE...
is placed in the COLLECTION. An offering from her HUSBAND. It is the UNMELTED, pristine CESM-I BULBUL- The Nightingale's Eye. CLOSE on ZEFIR'S SULLEN FACE.
And she flourished in every way.
Totalmente. The OLD MERCHANT in his night shirt, stands directly behind her. He bends her over the bed, face-down. He unbuttons a MODESTY FLAP at the back of her night dress, exposing her bottom.
She began to rebel even against
the gestures of submission

To give him height, he steps onto a FOOT STOOL. HIS FEET are disfigured with GOUT and his TOENAILS GNARLED and deathly. THE OLD MERCHANT mounts her like a sad donkey. HOLD ON THE OLD MAN'S FACE, pained with effort... THE DJINN (V.O.) For she acquired a mastery of love-craft... Suddenly, he GASPS. Something she's doing gives him an INTENSE SENSATION. A thrill!
...out of reach of any human who had not made love with a Djinn.

He finds himself being PUSHED BACK onto a CHAIR stacked with books. ZEFIR straddles him. As his HANDS splay out, reaching for HER FACE, we see the GREY HAIR on his forearms standing on end, electrified! His HEAD JOLTS BACK and his ARMS SPREAD, Christ-like. Ecstatic. He cries out! OVERWHELMED WITH PLEASURE. NOW... They are at THE DOOR...
Are you happy?
ZEFIR shoves him out. Then... Grabs his cane, hands it to him - and in exchange - takes his PINCE-NEZ. She shuts the door, bolting the locks. CLANK, CLACK!
INT IN THE HALL OUTSIDE...
THE OLD MAN is left STUPEFIED - a whimpering zombie in a nightshirt. He looks down at his groin, then turns back...CLAWING at HER DOOR. Wanting more.
His craving for her became an obsession.
And when he would come to her, I would leave her room and journey the sky...
VIEWED THROUGH ZEFIR'S OPEN WINDOW
I saw the oceans and the mountains and the beasts of the forest where no man treads.
PULL BACK to find... THE DJINN, CRADLING ZEFIR IN HIS ARMS. He is caressing her FACE, languid and pale.
And when I would return she would be waiting for me. I would tell her of my day and she would faint
with joy and disappointment.
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
Why didn't she make a wish to break free?
There was something more important to her. She had devised a 'Mathematica,' a language to explain the forces which bring space and time and matter into being.
INT BACK IN ZEFIR'S ROOM... NIGHT
STREWN with PAPERS, on which she has written endless ALGEBRAIC EQUATIONS. We find her at the table, muttering, SCRIBBLING feverishly. THE DJINN (V.O.)

HER INK-SPLATTERED PAGE... Crammed with wild ALGEBRAIC SEQUENCES - flowing from her pen. She STOPS ABRUPTLY and CROSSES OUT her most recent calculation. She has come to a DEAD END. She sinks to the floor, foetal-like. When THE DJINN puts a consoling hand on her shoulder, she shrugs him off. THE DJINN (V.O.) She needed a key. A key to open the doors of her perception...
INT BACK IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
The afternoon light plays on HIS WISTFUL FACE.
So she used her second wish. I taught her to dream as Djinn do. Awake. INT NOW...

THE INK SPLATTERED PAGE fades away but the CALCULATIONS REMAIN, suspended...FLOATING IN SPACE. It's hard to tell whether we are at the level of electrons or vast galaxies. Yet, what we are seeing is what unifies them - MATHEMATICS.

And in this way, the solutions came to her. She was able to explain powers invisible... We are moving through PLANES of Geometry, Calculus and Abstract Algebra variations of the CELEBRATED EQUATIONS of Newton, Maxwell and Einstein.
INT AGAIN...IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM
On ALITHEA, caught up in THE DJINN'S recollections.
...electromagnetic fields and forces. The very stuff of which the Djinn are made.
To demonstrate this, he wriggles his fingers and a VAPOUR - BLACK, RED and SHIMMERING - emanates from their tips.
You are electromagnetic?
As you are dust, I am Subtle Fire. And when she was to bear a child... I was plagued with happiness. For I knew it would strengthen us.
She was carrying your child? THE DJINN A child of fire and dust.
So where did it go wrong?
Alithea, I loved her. I loved the fervour of her mind. I loved her anger. I loved my power to turn her frowns into smiles. I loved her more than Sheba.
More than your freedom?
Yes. This is quite a confession.
He goes further...
It became my greatest desire to keep her. To remain her prisoner. The thought of being set loose sickened my heart. ABRUPTLY...
I caught myself stopping her...
THE DJINN puts his fingers to ZEFIR'S LIPS.
...lest she make her third wish. IN THE AGATHA CHRISTIE ROOM... ALITHEA is taken aback.
Oh gosh.
I made a mess of it. She began to accuse me of trapping her, like her husband.
IN ZEFIR'S LOFT

THE DJINN 'melts' the CESM-I BULBUL and places HIS HAND in the 'mercury' of tiny beads. As he is ENVELOPED, he VAPORISES and scintillates like a heat haze. As the BOTTLE REASSEMBLES, he is SWEPT INTO IT.
I tried to make amends. To atone. I would put myself in the bottle. To be sealed. That way she could have power over me.
